[TPLU 44-12/2010-T^*T^T-H] MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th December, 2010 S.0.2907(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of Section 3 of the Disaster Management Act, 2005 (53 of 2005), the Chairperson of the National Disaster Management Authority has designated Shri M. Shashidhar Reddy, MLA, Member, National Disaster Management Authority as the Vice-Chairperson of the said Authority.
